privileged_info_summary: The task operates on completely synthetic data generated during the task setup. The target patient is Maria Santos, who is explicitly created by setup_task.sh. The target insurance company is BlueCross BlueShield, which is also seeded by the setup script. The coverage details to be added, including the policy number (BCB-2024-78432), group number (GRP-4401-EAST), plan name (PPO Gold 500), and copay (25.00), are all synthetic parameters specified in the task description and evaluated by the verifier.
